message:
bd-3bxhj.5.5: Add CSS-like style/layout/text parity types for migration

Extend ftui-style with CSS-like types needed for OpenTUI migration parity:

- TextTransform: uppercase, lowercase, capitalize (ASCII-only for determinism)
- TextOverflow: clip, ellipsis, custom indicator
- Overflow: visible, hidden, scroll, auto
- WhiteSpaceMode: normal, pre, pre-wrap, pre-line, nowrap with semantic
  queries (collapses_whitespace, allows_wrap, preserves_newlines)
- TextAlign: left, right, center, justify
- LineClamp: max-lines with clamp() returning (count, truncated)

All types are Copy, Default, and feature-gated for serde serialization.
22 new tests cover all transform behaviors, mode semantics, and defaults.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
